title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, Elastic, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration expertise, and the ability to align Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ is required.
_note: Backed by $85M+ in funding; 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, Fintech/B2B SaaS aligns perfectly, Salesforce expertise confirmed, and scaling experience well beyond $30M ARR threshold. New York/Tel Aviv hybrid with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration is ideal for candidate profile.
ai_opener: I've followed Finout's trajectory scaling cloud cost management to enterprises like NYT and Wiz, and your GTM operational challenges at this stage are exactly where I've driven revenue acceleration in similar high-growth B2B SaaS environments. With 15+ years in RevOps and deep Salesforce administration experience scaling operations across $30M-$100M+ ARR phases, I'm excited about the opportunity to build Finout's operational backbone while leveraging the Tel Aviv technical hub proximity.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence SaaS leader, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning; deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation; strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool); and Salesforce proficiency. Experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan is a plus. Strong cross-functional stakeholder management required.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience directly aligns with Gong's GTM intelligence focus; deep Salesforce proficiency, pipeline forecasting expertise, and territory strategy background perfectly address the role's core requirements. Only minor gap is specific territory management tool experience, which is learnable.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Gong is building out Territory Strategy & Operations—this feels like a natural fit given your track record scaling RevOps at B2B SaaS scale. Your expertise in pipeline forecasting and data-driven territory design maps directly to what they're solving for. Would be worth a conversation to explore how your GTM systems thinking could accelerate their seller productivity agenda.

title: RevOps Systems Manager
description: Actabl, a hospitality SaaS company serving 10,000+ properties, seeks a RevOps Systems Manager responsible for administration, optimization, and strategic oversight of Salesforce and other RevOps-owned systems. The role ensures seamless operation, scalability, and security of the CRM and integrated tools. Requires Salesforce Advanced Administrator and App Builder certifications, 5+ years of hands-on Salesforce administration managing complex orgs independently, and experience with RevOps tools like Outreach, Gong, PandaDoc, ZoomInfo, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and SOQL skills required.
score_reason: Strong Salesforce admin expertise and RevOps tools experience align well with the core requirements. However, this is a systems/administration-focused role rather than a strategic RevOps leadership position, which may underutilize Omri's senior GTM executive background and strategic capabilities.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years scaling RevOps across B2B SaaS, with deep hands-on Salesforce administration managing complex, multi-team orgs. I noticed Actabl is serving 10,000+ properties and likely scaling fast; I'd be interested in exploring how I could bring both the technical Salesforce expertise AND strategic RevOps thinking to ensure your systems scale seamlessly with your growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Nooks, an AI Sales Assistant Platform backed by over $70M from top VCs including Kleiner Perkins, seeks its first GTM Engineer to serve as the technical co-pilot for the Sales Development organization. You'll own setup, optimization, and enablement within the Nooks platform. The company has grown ARR 4x then 3x and plans to 3x again this year. Nooks is loved by sales teams at companies like HubSpot and Rippling. Ideal for a technical builder who thrives in a fast-growing sales-tech environment.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—GTM Engineer role at a high-growth AI sales platform aligns perfectly with Omri's B2B SaaS expertise, pipeline optimization background, and AI-native GTM focus. The $70M-backed company with proven 4x/3x growth trajectory and enterprise customer base (HubSpot, Rippling) offers the scale and complexity he thrives in.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building GTM engines at scale in B2B SaaS, and Nooks' approach to AI-native sales enablement is exactly the kind of technical, high-velocity problem I get excited about. Your 4x→3x growth trajectory and design-first positioning with HubSpot/Rippling tells me you're solving real pain points, and I'd be curious to explore how a RevOps mindset could accelerate your SDR infrastructure even further.

title: GTM Engineer
description: FacilityOS is a B2B SaaS company helping mid-to-large enterprises stay safe, compliant, and operationally sharp through its facility management platform. As GTM Engineer, you'll help build FacilityOS's first AI Workforce — intelligent agents helping Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success work smarter. You'll build, configure, and continuously improve these agents, working at the intersection of data, automation, and human workflows, designing how AI systems connect, run, learn, and improve over time. Ideal for someone excited about embedding AI into the GTM motion.
score_reason: Excellent match on role type (GTM Engineer), company stage (B2B SaaS), and AI-native GTM focus. Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps background and ability to design intelligent automation across Sales/Marketing/CS workflows. Only minor gap: facility management is outside core verticals, but GTM-level work is highly transferable.
ai_opener: Hi FacilityOS team — Your AI Workforce concept resonates deeply. As a RevOps leader who's spent 15 years building intelligent GTM motions, I've seen firsthand how the biggest wins come from embedding AI agents into the actual workflows Sales, Marketing, and CS teams live in daily. I'd love to explore how to architect these agents to not just automate, but to genuinely improve decision-making across your GTM flywheel.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Supabase, the Postgres development platform built by developers for developers, seeks a GTM Engineer to join its Growth and RevOps teams and make go-to-market teams dramatically more productive. You'll work closely with Growth, RevOps, Sales, and Success to translate product usage and customer signals into actionable workflows, improving how opportunities are identified, prioritized, and converted across the funnel. This is a systems and execution role focused on increasing efficiency of the PLG → revenue engine. Ideal for someone who thrives in async, fast-paced environments.
score_reason: Perfect alignment with Omri's GTM Engineer and RevOps expertise in a high-growth B2B SaaS context. The role's focus on PLG-to-revenue systems, pipeline efficiency, and cross-functional execution directly matches his 15+ years of strategic RevOps leadership.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue engines at scale in B2B SaaS, and Supabase's approach to PLG is compelling. Your need for someone to translate product signals into actionable RevOps workflows aligns perfectly with how I've historically scaled GTM systems; I'd love to discuss how we can dramatically compress your sales cycle and improve funnel visibility as you mature from product-led growth.

title: Marketing Operations Manager, Campaign Ops
description: Bloomerang seeks a Marketing Operations Manager – Campaign Operations to bring marketing campaigns to life and ensure flawless execution across its marketing automation platform. Reporting to the Director of Marketing Operations, you'll work with Demand Generation, Lifecycle Marketing, and Revenue Operations teams. Requires 5–7 years of Marketing Operations experience in B2B SaaS, hands-on HubSpot or Marketo experience, familiarity with Salesforce, Outreach, LeanData, and Chili Piper, campaign execution expertise (QA, testing, scheduling), data management skills, and reporting/analytics competency. score_reason: Strong technical fit with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience and deep HubSpot/Salesforce expertise exceeding the 5-7 year requirement. title: Head of Sales and Marketing (B2B SaaS)
description: saas.group, which acquires and scales promising B2B SaaS ventures, seeks a Head of Sales & Marketing to lead all commercial activities across one of its brands. You'll take full ownership of the growth engine from top-of-funnel acquisition to conversion, retention, and revenue expansion, building and optimizing both Marketing and Sales functions while working with the CEO. Requires 7–10+ years of commercial experience across B2B SaaS with meaningful exposure to both Sales and Marketing, and a proven track record scaling revenue engines in SMB or mid-market SaaS. score_reason: Strong alignment with B2B SaaS revenue scaling expertise and 15+ years exceeds the 7-10 year requirement. However, the role emphasizes equal Sales & Marketing ownership rather than pure RevOps/GTM focus, and saas.group's portfolio-company model differs from traditional high-growth operator environments Omri likely excels in.

Your track record architecting revenue operations and GTM strategies in B2B SaaS aligns perfectly with what they need—especially the requirement to own both demand generation and sales function optimization simultaneously. Have you considered a Head of Sales & Marketing role where you'd bring RevOps rigor to a scaling portfolio company?

title: Head of Sales (Mid-Market B2B)
description: Belkins, a B2B lead generation and sales services company, seeks a Head of Sales (Mid-Market B2B) reporting to the Chief Growth Officer to lead a team of 5 AEs, 2 BDRs, and Sales Operations and drive the next phase of growth.
